brief: Error responses are inconsistent: some return {error}, others {error, details}. Normalize all to {error: string, details: array|null}.
acceptance_criteria: All 400 responses include error and details fields
Existing tests updated to match new format
oracle_test: GET /bookmarks/999 returns {error: 'Bookmark not found', details: null}. POST /bookmarks with missing url returns {error, details: [...]}.
